label: Slack Message
description: Send a message to a Slack channel via incoming webhook. Supports templated text, channel override, and Block Kit blocks.

settings.name: webhookUrl
settings.label: Webhook URL
settings.description: Slack incoming webhook URL. Falls back to SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env when unset.

settings.name: blocks
settings.label: Block Kit blocks
settings.description: Optional Slack Block Kit array — passed through to the webhook payload as-is.

ai.shortDescription: Post a message to Slack via incoming webhook.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to notify a Slack channel about a workflow event, alert, or status update.
ai.examplePrompt: send a Slack alert to the #incidents channel when severity is high
ai.promptHints: Reference output via {{steps.<id>.result.sent}} (boolean). Falls back to SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env when webhookUrl unset.

outputAssertions.name: sent_ok
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Slack webhook responded with non-200 status.
